name: Frutta Cerita
lore:
Lore of Frutta Cerita
                                    


Tomorrow Monday is dirty. This is Storyfulta. A person who is cursed because he always gets irritated when tomorrow is Monday and is lazy to go to school. In the past, I was just a normal person. Every Sunday afternoon his face turns dark and every Sunday night he always screams. No, I have school tomorrow. The noise made my ears explode. It is difficult to cure when the brain is affected in this way.
Lyrics
Orginal (indonesian)
Najis besok Senin. Ialah Fruta Cerita. Sosok manusia yang dikutuk karena selalu kesal saat besok Senin, ia malas masuk sekolah. Dulu, dia hanyalah manusia biasa. Setiap minggu sore, wajahnya berubah muram dan tiap minggu malam selalu teriak. No, besok sekolah. Suara bisingnya membuat telinga meledak. Susah nih disembuhin kalau udah kena begini otaknya. Kalian harus bawa ke Pak Ustaz. Tek teman kalian yang begini.
Translated (english)
Unclean tomorrow is Monday. It is Fruta Cerita. A human figure who is cursed because he is always upset when the next Monday comes, he is lazy to go to school. In the past, he was just an ordinary human. Every Sunday afternoon, his face turned gloomy and every Sunday night he always shouted. No, school tomorrow. The noise made his ears explode. It's hard to cure this when his brain has been affected like this. You have to take him to Mr. Ustaz. Tek your friend is like this.
